response.body:
{
  "id": "{{randomValue length=6 type='NUMERIC'}}",
  "properties": {
    "email": "{{jsonPath request.body '$.properties.email'}}",
    "firstname": "{{jsonPath request.body '$.properties.firstname'}}",
    "lastname": "{{jsonPath request.body '$.properties.lastname'}}",
    "hs_marketable_status": "false",
    "createdate": "{{now format='yyyy-MM-dd\'T\'HH:mm:ss.SSSXXX'}}",
    "lastmodifieddate": "{{now format='yyyy-MM-dd\'T\'HH:mm:ss.SSSXXX'}}"
  },
  "createdAt": "{{now format='yyyy-MM-dd\'T\'HH:mm:ss.SSSXXX'}}",
  "updatedAt": "{{now format='yyyy-MM-dd\'T\'HH:mm:ss.SSSXXX'}}",
  "archived": false
}
